prompt: Generate an image for A/B testing the loading UI interface. Left hand side is a pop up window with a circular loading icon, the right hand side is a pop up window with a horizontal loading icon showing the percentage. Make sure the style is same as the image provided.
prompt_refined: Generate an image for A/B testing a loading UI interface. On the left side, render a pop-up window containing a circular loading icon in the minimalist, grayscale style of image 1. On the right side, render a separate pop-up window displaying a horizontal loading bar that includes a percentage, also maintaining the minimalist, grayscale style derived from image 1.
